message:
fix(fp-io): reject empty SQL table names in validation

Empty table names passed the validation check because
Iterator::all() returns true for empty iterators. Added
explicit is_empty() check to both read_sql_table and write_sql
table name validation. Added test confirming empty names are rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
